instruction:
Repair the disturbed scenic SVG: african savanna sunset.

Patch:
- remove sv_039-extra-survey-marker
- download-sv_039-ellipse-003.fill: "#ef4444" -> "#fff0b0"
- download-sv_039-circle-001.cx: 835.0 -> 800
- download-sv_039-ellipse-002.stroke-width: 7.0 -> 3
- download-sv_039-rect-002.opacity: 0.18 -> 0.4
